{{Quote|This may be my last entry. I know I've said that before, but one of these days I'm going to be right.|Suz Tanwa.|<ref name="yavin">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040722yavin|text=Yavin: The Big Red One|int=Yavin: The Big Red One}} {{1stm}} {{C|Vignette}}</ref>}}
'''Suz Tanwa''' was a famous [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] treasure hunter and [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]]. She was notable for her work in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], where she tracked down the treasure of her ancestor, [[Suvam Tan]] on [[Yavin 22]]. She flew a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] called the ''[[Reeko]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
